content.text:
I don’t have the cached policy content here. Could you share the text (or a link) to the policy you want summarized? If you can’t paste it, tell me the policy name and the intended audience.

If helpful, I can provide either a quick executive summary or a detailed section-by-section recap. Here are two common formats I can deliver:

- Executive summary (1–2 paragraphs): captures purpose, scope, and the top requirements.
- Section-by-section outline: bullet points for each section (Purpose, Scope, Key requirements, Roles and responsibilities, Data/privacy considerations, Enforcement, Exceptions, Review/update frequency, Definitions).

If you’d like, I can also tailor the summary to a specific audience (e.g., leadership, engineers, compliance) and keep it to a preferred length.
